_meta.description: This file contains the list of services offered by the portfolio owner in their freelance capacity. Each service has a title, subtitle, description, icon identifier, and a list of example use cases. This data powers the Services section visible in freelance mode only.

fields.id: Unique identifier for the service, used for internal referencing and anchor links.
fields.title: Display name of the service category.
fields.subtitle: A short clarifying line below the title.
fields.description: A client-facing paragraph explaining the service, its scope, and what assistance is included.
fields.icon: Icon identifier string used to render the corresponding icon in the UI.
fields.examples: Array of example project types or use cases that fall under this service.

services.title: Software Consultancy
services.subtitle: Turn Your Ideas into the Right Plan
services.description: I help you figure out exactly what you need to build. We discuss your goals, I explain what works best technically in simple terms, spot potential issues early, and create a clear roadmap so you avoid costly mistakes and get results faster.
examples: What type of software should you build for your business?
How to choose the right tools and services without overspending?
Planning your app or website step-by-step
Analysing your current setup for improvements
Guidance on growing your project safely

services.title: Full Systems & Growth
services.subtitle: Websites + Apps + Everything Connected
services.description: Build your complete online presence: website, mobile app, backend, hosting, and automations - all working together seamlessly. Perfect for businesses ready to scale, with advice on hosting, security, and future growth.

services.title: AI-Powered Tools
services.subtitle: Automations & Smart Assistants
services.description: Practical AI integrations that save you and your team real time — chatbots, workflow automations, smart search or internal tool engineering with easy to deploy, maintain and debug codebases.
examples: Custom chatbots trained on your data
Smart search for internal knowledge bases

services.title: Web Development
services.subtitle: Websites & Landing Pages
services.description: Complete websites and web apps built for real business goals - not just looks and smoothness. From simple landing pages to full online tools that handle everything; users, payments, data. I build, launch, and keep them running with minimal hassle.

services.title: Backend Systems & APIs
services.subtitle: The engine behind your product
services.description: The reliable behind-the-scenes systems that make your website or app powerful, fast and reliable. Handling user data, payments, automations securely, and grows as your business does. I can also improve, optimise or migrate what you already have.
examples: Connecting your app to other services
Scaling to a lots of users without slowing down

services.title: Mobile Apps
services.subtitle: Android and iOS
services.description: Cross-platform mobile apps that work natively on both Android and iOS. No compromise on quality, performance and designs. Assistance regarding Play Store and App Store deployment, hosting and maintenance can also be discussed.
